user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Northwind Traders.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 11:53 EST
Subject: Follow-up: migration architecture Review

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-01-06 16:36 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about migration architecture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on migration architecture from our last session.

[00:05:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:10:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:17:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:20:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:25:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:30:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:35:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:37:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:41:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.
